summary: Iteration 18: Enrollment endpoints and frontend fixes verification complete. All 14 backend tests PASSED. All 7 frontend UI tests PASSED. Backend enrollment endpoints correctly implement: status 'in_progress' for new enrollments, 'confirmed' after confirmation, installments saved to 'installments' collection, pipeline filters 'in_progress' only. Frontend correctly shows: sidebar with 'Le mie iscrizioni' and 'Iscrizioni e pagamenti' + 'Comunicazioni', profile page with form fields and save button, my-enrollments page with status badges and installment rows, course detail page with 'Iscriviti adesso' and 'Voglio iscrivermi' buttons, admin enrollments page with 3 tabs, admin comms page with 3 tabs, inbox page retrocompatibility working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend enrollment endpoints correctly implement status flow: 'in_progress' -> 'confirmed'
POST /api/school/enrollments creates enrollment with status='in_progress' and current_step=1
POST /api/school/enrollments with same course_id returns existing enrollment (resume flow)
GET /api/school/enrollments/my returns enrollments with course_title and installments enriched
PUT /api/school/enrollments/{id} correctly updates draft fields (motivation, background, payment_plan, current_step)
POST /api/school/enrollments/{id}/contract saves consents, signature_text, contract_signed_at, contract_ip, contract_user_agent
POST /api/school/enrollments/{id}/confirm sets status='confirmed', confirmed_at, creates installments in 'installments' collection
Frontend sidebar correctly shows 'Le mie iscrizioni' in 'Il mio spazio' group
Frontend sidebar correctly shows 'Iscrizioni e pagamenti' and 'Comunicazioni' in 'Gestione' group
Frontend profile page loads with all form fields and save button
Frontend my-enrollments page shows enrollments with status badges ('Iscritto/a', 'In fase di iscrizione') and installment rows
Frontend course detail page shows 'Iscriviti adesso' button and 'Voglio iscrivermi' text
Frontend admin enrollments page shows 3 tabs: 'Pipeline onboarding', 'Operatività corsi', 'Scadenze pagamenti'
Frontend admin comms page shows 3 tabs: 'Posta in arrivo', 'Regole', 'Template'
seed_data_creation: Test enrollments created during backend tests with unique course_ids (test_course_*, test_resume_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified all enrollment endpoint fixes and frontend changes. Backend: (1) POST /api/school/enrollments creates enrollment with status='in_progress', current_step=1, (2) Same course_id returns existing enrollment for resume flow, (3) GET /api/school/enrollments/my returns enrollments with course_title and installments, (4) PUT updates draft fields, (5) POST /contract saves consents and signature, (6) POST /confirm sets status='confirmed' and creates installments in 'installments' collection, (7) GET /admin/enrollment-pipeline returns only 'in_progress' enrollments. Frontend: (1) Sidebar shows 'Le mie iscrizioni' in 'Il mio spazio' and 'Iscrizioni e pagamenti' + 'Comunicazioni' in 'Gestione', (2) Profile page has form fields and save button, (3) My-enrollments shows status badges and installments, (4) Course detail has 'Iscriviti adesso' and 'Voglio iscrivermi' buttons, (5) Admin enrollments has 3 tabs, (6) Admin comms has 3 tabs, (7) /inbox retrocompatibility works.

features_verified.backend_enrollment_resume_flow: PASS - Same course_id returns existing enrollment

features_verified.backend_enrollment_update_draft: PASS - PUT updates motivation, background, payment_plan, current_step
features_verified.backend_enrollment_contract: PASS - POST /contract saves consents, signature_text, contract_signed_at
features_verified.backend_enrollment_confirm: PASS - POST /confirm sets status='confirmed', confirmed_at, current_step=6
features_verified.backend_enrollment_installments: PASS - Confirm creates installments in 'installments' collection
features_verified.frontend_sidebar_le_mie_iscrizioni: PASS - 'Le mie iscrizioni' visible in 'Il mio spazio' group
features_verified.frontend_sidebar_iscrizioni_e_pagamenti: PASS - 'Iscrizioni e pagamenti' visible in 'Gestione' group
features_verified.frontend_profile_page: PASS - Profile page loads with form fields and save button
features_verified.frontend_my_enrollments_page: PASS - Shows enrollments with status badges and installment rows

features_verified.frontend_admin_enrollments_tabs: PASS - Shows 3 tabs: Pipeline onboarding, Operatività corsi, Scadenze pagamenti
